ogTitle: Teddywaddy West vs Telangatuk East: Climate Safety

heading: Teddywaddy West vs Telangatuk East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Teddywaddy West, Victoria and Telangatuk East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Telangatuk East has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Teddywaddy West (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Teddywaddy West or Telangatuk East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Teddywaddy West has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Telangatuk East scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Teddywaddy West scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Telangatuk East scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Teddywaddy West or Telangatuk East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Telangatuk East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
